scenarios.name: price-query-generic

history.content: Hi, thanks for calling MRI First. How can I help you today?
How much does an MRI cost?

scenarios.expected_behavior: Agent speaks 'MRI scans are $600 for one body area, and $300 for each additional area in the same appointment.' then closing line. No smart_voice_agent tool call.

scenarios.name: price-query-with-service

history.content: Hi, thanks for calling MRI First. How can I help you today?
What's the price for a knee MRI?

scenarios.expected_behavior: Agent speaks the hardcoded MRI pricing ($600 / $300) without calling smart_voice_agent.

scenarios.name: price-query-how-much

history.content: Hi, thanks for calling MRI First. How can I help you today?
How much do you charge for your scans?

scenarios.expected_behavior: Agent speaks the hardcoded MRI pricing ($600 / $300) then closing line. No smart_voice_agent tool call.
